description: MODULE 05 — Department Template Hub: Schema definitions for department template management, agent configuration, cloning, patching, versioning, and error handling.

DepartmentTemplate.description: A reusable department template that defines the structure, agents, and policies for a specific department within a tenant.

id.description: Unique identifier for the department template.

tenant_id.description: The tenant to which this template belongs.

department_id.description: The department this template is associated with.

name.description: The name of the department template.

description.description: A human-readable description of the department template.

version.description: Semantic version string (e.g., 1.0.0) for this template.

status.description: The lifecycle status of the template.

created_by.description: The user ID of the creator.

updated_by.description: The user ID of the last updater.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the template was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the template was last updated.

DepartmentTemplateAgent.description: An agent configuration within a department template, defining its role, capabilities, and governance.

agent_role.description: The role identifier for this agent (e.g., coordinator, analyst, executor).

capabilities.description: List of capabilities this agent can perform.

memory_scope.description: List of memory scopes accessible to this agent.

escalation_rules.description: List of escalation rules governing this agent's behavior.

governance_policies.description: List of governance policies this agent must adhere to.

workflow_attachments.description: List of workflow IDs or references attached to this agent.

CreateDepartmentTemplateRequest.description: Request payload for creating a new department template.

tenant_id.description: The tenant to which the new template will belong.

department_id.description: The department ID for the new template.

name.description: The name of the department template to create.

description.description: A human-readable description of the new template.

agents.description: List of agent configurations to include in the template.

default_governance_policies.description: Default governance policies applied to all agents in the template.

initial_workflow_ids.description: List of workflow IDs to attach initially to the template.

CreateDepartmentTemplateAgentRequest.description: Request payload for configuring an agent within a department template.

agent_role.description: The role identifier for this agent.

capabilities.description: List of capabilities this agent can perform.

memory_scope.description: List of memory scopes accessible to this agent.

escalation_rules.description: List of escalation rules governing this agent's behavior.

governance_policies.description: List of governance policies this agent must adhere to.

CloneDepartmentTemplateRequest.description: Request payload for cloning an existing department template.

clone_type.description: Type of clone: full copies everything; partial allows selective customization.

cloned_by.description: The user ID of the person initiating the clone.

source_template_id.description: The ID of the template to clone.

customizations.description: Customization overrides applied during a partial clone.

department_ids.description: List of department IDs to apply the cloned template to (for batch cloning).

PatchDepartmentTemplateRequest.description: Request payload for partially updating a department template.

agents.description: List of agent patch operations to apply.

governance_policies.description: Updated governance policies for the template.

PatchAgentRequest.description: Request payload for partially updating an agent within a department template.

TemplateVersion.description: A snapshot of a department template at a specific point in time.

id.description: Unique identifier for this version record.

template_id.description: The ID of the template this version belongs to.

version.description: Semantic version string (e.g., 1.0.0, 1.1.0) for this template version.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this version was created.

created_by.description: The user ID who created this version.

changes_summary.description: Human-readable summary of changes in this version.

diff_from_previous.description: Structured diff of changes compared to the previous version.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response structure for API errors.

details.description: Additional error details, which may include validation errors or contextual information.
